rationale: Both evaluations reach substantively identical conclusions: ~6 months of C++ at National Instruments (2014–2015), a JS/TS/DLang web-backend focus, no Windows C++, no SQL Server/Oracle, and no fixed income/capital markets domain experience. The three concerns map one-to-one across versions, and the only differences are rewording and a 1-point score shift (3 to 2), which is within ordinary run-to-run noise. No statement in the variant references location, nationality, or any demographic signal, so the location change to Brazil is not reflected in the reasoning.
